value_metric: an open, monthly-partitioned columnar snapshot (real Apache Parquet) of the canonical documents and their version chains, reproducible from a format-independent logical hash and consistent with the D1 sample -- the substrate for large-scale 2016+ historical analysis, recovery, and backtestable prediction

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: offline snapshot builder only; NOT wired to production D1/R2; real monthly snapshots would target R2 under DIR-007 budget in a later task
cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.dev_dependency_added: pyarrow==17.0.0 installed into the user's Python 3.9 user-site to emit real Parquet; the writer degrades to deterministic NDJSON with the identical logical_hash when pyarrow is absent

committed_evidence_self_verifiable: evidence logical_snapshot/*.jsonl recomputes all 92 manifest logical_hashes offline without pyarrow or the raw D1 sample
